messages.content: Add an FAQ section with 4 common questions people ask before starting a vending machine business.

context.title: Coffee vending for offices
context.metaDescription: Coffee vending machines for modern workplaces.

props.heading: Old headline
props.body: Coffee vending machines for offices keep teams stocked with fresh drinks without anyone owning a brewing rota. A managed machine covers restocking, cleaning, and fault response so facilities can stay focused on the building.

faqItems.answer: Most modern coffee machines require a dedicated power outlet and a mains water connection. If a water line is not available, look for models with an internal reservoir, which will need to be refilled periodically by staff or a service technician.
faqItems.question: What are the utility requirements for a coffee vending machine?

faqItems.answer: Managed service providers typically include scheduled visits for restocking ingredients, cleaning internal components, and routine maintenance. You should confirm the expected service frequency and how quickly a technician can respond if the machine stops working.
faqItems.question: How does the maintenance and restocking process work?

faqItems.answer: The choice between bean-to-cup machines and pod-based systems usually depends on office size and volume. Bean-to-cup provides fresh-ground quality but requires more frequent waste disposal, while pod machines offer variety and easier cleanup for smaller teams.
faqItems.question: Should I choose a bean-to-cup or a pod-based machine?

faqItems.answer: Consider your office's daily usage volume and available floor space. A machine that is too small requires constant refilling, while an oversized unit may be inefficient for your current headcount. Most providers can help audit your daily cup consumption to size the unit correctly.
faqItems.question: How do I determine the right size machine for my team?

input.body: Before choosing a coffee solution, address these common logistical and operational questions to ensure the machine fits your office environment.
input.title: Common questions about office coffee solutions
